AddressInfo.Title: DC at Euphoria Golf & Lifestyle Estate
AddressInfo.AccessComments:
Guest Parking at Reception	
Enter through the main gate, turn left, drive for 1 to 2km. The Reception will be on your right, enter the parking lot, and the charge points will be on the first row. - Enter through the main gate, turn left, drive for 1 to 2km. The Reception will be on your right, enter the parking lot, and the charge points will be on the first row.

GeneralComments: Euphoria Golf & Lifestyle Estate offers a unique and memorable tranquil experience. The estate is set in the beautiful Waterberg mountain range, only two hours from Johannesburg and one and a half hours from Pretoria. The 18-hole championship golf course is the first in Africa to be designed by Annika Sorenstam and provides an exclusive experience.
